## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue it fixes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] CI/DevOps

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style guidelines (`ruff check` passes)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally (`make test`)
- [ ] Type checker passes (`mypy src`)
- [ ] I have updated the relevant documentation
- [ ] I have updated `.env.example` if adding new configuration
- [ ] I have added a changelog entry under `[Unreleased]`

## Related Roadmap Phase

Which phase in `docs/roadmap/` does this implement?

## Additional Notes

Any deployment notes, migration steps, or breaking changes.
